title: angelica pubescens var. matsumurae
intro: Angelica pubescens var. matsumurae, also known as Japanese angelica or dong quai, is a type of plant in the carrot family that is native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-arthritic effects, which have been used to treat a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of angelica pubescens var. matsumurae include reducing menstrual cramps, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include dried roots, capsules, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
